title: BEM-605 report template request
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
base=Path('governance/internal_contour'); base.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
curator_inbox=Path('governance/curator/inbox'); curator_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
role_inbox=Path('governance/role_orchestrator/inbox'); role_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
internal_tasks=base/'tasks'; internal_tasks.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
analyst_plans=base/'analyst/plans'; analyst_plans.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
auditor_inbox=base/'auditor/inbox'; auditor_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
mailbox=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude'); mailbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
provider_gates=Path('governance/provider_gates'); provider_gates.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
operator_queue=Path('governance/operator_decision_queue'); operator_queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

bem='BEM-605'
decision_id='bem605_hourly_report_canon_template'

curator_pkg={
 'schema_version':'curator_intake.v1',
 'record_type':'operator_task_curator_intake',
 'bem':bem,
 'task_id':decision_id,
 'source':'operator_chat_request',
 'operator_request':'Hourly Telegram monitoring report does not follow canon. Analyze and agree report template with Claude auditor, send to operator for approval, then execute through full internal contour and report monitoring of each element.',
 'status':'ready_for_role_orchestrator',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
curator_file=curator_inbox/(decision_id+'.json')
curator_file.write_text(json.dumps(curator_pkg,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

role_pkg={
 'schema_version':'role_orchestrator_intake.v1',
 'record_type':'curator_route_to_internal_contour',
 'bem':bem,
 'task_id':decision_id,
 'source_file':str(curator_file),
 'from_role':'curator',
 'to_role':'analyst',
 'route':['analyst:gpt','auditor:claude_primary_required','operator_decision:telegram','executor:claude_primary_then_gpt_reserve'],
 'provider_gate_required':True,
 'status':'ready_for_internal_contour',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
role_file=role_inbox/(decision_id+'.json')
role_file.write_text(json.dumps(role_pkg,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

internal_task={
 'schema_version':'internal_contour_task.v1',
 'record_type':'hourly_report_template_fix_task',
 'bem':bem,
 'task_id':decision_id,
 'goal':'Replace hourly Telegram monitoring report with canonical, readable, operator-approved template and verify full autonomous contour.',
 'problem_evidence':['Telegram hourly messages are short non-canonical lines such as BEM-41/BEM-48 pass candidates and do not show stage, roadmap, checklist, table, provider route, or blockers.'],
 'required_chain':['Curator GPT','Registrar/Role Orchestrator','Analyst GPT','Provider gate for Claude Code','Auditor Claude primary or explicit fallback','Operator approval decision package','Executor Claude primary or explicit fallback','Internal audit','Executor selftest','Monitoring report'],
 'acceptance_criteria':['Template follows canon: BEM header, stage/roadmap %, checklist, readable table, provider route, blockers, next action.','Template is mobile-readable in Telegram.','Routine hourly report uses this template.','Operator approval is requested through structured decision package.','Provider gate records whether Claude Code primary or GPT reserve was used.','Final report states how every element worked.'],
 'status':'ready_for_analyst',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
task_file=internal_tasks/(decision_id+'.json')
task_file.write_text(json.dumps(internal_task,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

analyst_plan={
 'schema_version':'internal_analyst_plan.v1',
 'bem':bem,
 'plan_id':'bem605_hourly_report_template_plan',
 'source_task':str(task_file),
 'role':'analyst:gpt',
 'status':'ready_for_claude_audit',
 'current_problem':'Hourly Telegram report is not canonical and does not explain route/provider/checks. Operator cannot evaluate system health from it.',
 'proposed_template':{
   'header':'BEM-HOURLY | SYSTEM MONITORING REPORT | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)',
   'stage':'Этап: X/Y (Z%)',
   'roadmap':'Дорожная карта: X/Y (Z%)',
   'checklist':['✅ Роли/контуры проверены','✅ Provider gate выполнен','✅ Последние события собраны','⚠️ Blocker если есть'],
   'table_columns':['Наименование','Описание','Обоснование'],
   'required_rows':['Текущий этап','Последнее действие','Provider route','Основной контур','Резервный контур','Telegram delivery','Blocker','Следующее действие'],
   'mobile_rule':'No wide markdown pipe tables in Telegram; use short 3-column semantic blocks or compact rows.'
 },
 'questions_for_claude':['Подтверждаешь ли этот канон hourly report?','Нужно ли разделить hourly status и operator decision request?','Какие поля обязательны для provider route: provider_checked, selected_provider, reserve_used, reason, proof_file?','Какой минимальный формат будет читабельным в Telegram на телефоне?'],
 'next':'Claude auditor review required before operator approval package.',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
plan_file=analyst_plans/'bem605_hourly_report_template_plan.json'
plan_md=analyst_plans/'bem605_hourly_report_template_plan.md'
plan_file.write_text(json.dumps(analyst_plan,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
plan_md.write_text('# BEM-605 | Analyst Plan | Hourly Telegram Report Canon'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Problem'+sep+analyst_plan['current_problem']+sep+sep+'## Proposed template'+sep+'BEM-HOURLY | SYSTEM MONITORING REPORT | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Этап: X/Y (Z%)'+sep+'Дорожная карта: X/Y (Z%)'+sep+sep+'Чек-лист:'+sep+'✅ Роли/контуры проверены'+sep+'✅ Provider gate выполнен'+sep+'✅ Последние события собраны'+sep+'⚠️ Blocker если есть'+sep+sep+'Таблица:'+sep+'Наименование | Описание | Обоснование'+sep+sep+'Rows: Текущий этап, Последнее действие, Provider route, Основной контур, Резервный контур, Telegram delivery, Blocker, Следующее действие.'+sep+sep+'## Claude questions'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+q for q in analyst_plan['questions_for_claude']])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)

audit_req={
 'schema_version':'internal_audit_request.v1',
 'bem':bem,
 'request_id':'bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_audit',
 'from_role':'analyst:gpt',
 'to_role':'auditor:claude',
 'status':'ready_for_claude_audit',
 'plan_file':str(plan_file),
 'provider_gate_required':True,
 'question':'Review and agree canonical hourly Telegram monitoring report template before operator approval and implementation.',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
auditor_req_file=auditor_inbox/'bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_audit.json'
auditor_req_file.write_text(json.dumps(audit_req,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

claude_mail=mailbox/'bem605_hourly_report_template_review_request.md'
claude_mail.write_text('# GPT TO CLAUDE | BEM-605 | HOURLY TELEGRAM REPORT TEMPLATE REVIEW'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'+sep+'From: GPT / Analyst'+sep+'To: Claude / Internal Auditor'+sep+'Requires operator decision: no'+sep+'Status: REQUEST_REVIEW'+sep+sep+'## Context'+sep+'Operator reports that hourly Telegram monitoring messages are not canonical and not useful enough. They do not show stage %, roadmap %, checklist, provider route, primary/reserve contour status, checks, or blockers.'+sep+sep+'## Requested from Claude'+sep+'Review the proposed hourly monitoring report canon and answer:'+sep+sep+'1. Do you approve the proposed structure?'+sep+'2. Should hourly status and operator decision request remain separate templates?'+sep+'3. What provider route fields are mandatory?'+sep+'4. What changes are required before operator approval?'+sep+sep+'## Proposed canon'+sep+'BEM-HOURLY | SYSTEM MONITORING REPORT | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Этап: X/Y (Z%)'+sep+'Дорожная карта: X/Y (Z%)'+sep+sep+'Чек-лист:'+sep+'✅ Роли/контуры проверены'+sep+'✅ Provider gate выполнен'+sep+'✅ Последние события собраны'+sep+'⚠️ Blocker если есть'+sep+sep+'Таблица/блоки:'+sep+'- Текущий этап | ... | why'+sep+'- Последнее действие | ... | why'+sep+'- Provider route | provider_checked, selected_provider, reserve_used | proof'+sep+'- Основной контур | claude_code status | proof'+sep+'- Резервный контур | gpt reserve status | proof'+sep+'- Telegram delivery | sent/pending/failed | proof'+sep+'- Blocker | null or blocker | reason'+sep+'- Следующее действие | next task | reason'+sep+sep+'## Required output'+sep+'Please write response to `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem605_hourly_report_template_review_response.md` with APPROVED / APPROVED_WITH_CHANGES / REJECTED and exact template changes.'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)

provider_gate={
 'schema_version':'provider_gate.v1',
 'bem':bem,
 'gate_id':'bem605_provider_gate_required',
 'purpose':'Before execution, check whether Claude Code primary contour is available for auditor/executor. If not, route to GPT reserve with explicit proof.',
 'required_fields':['provider_checked','selected_provider','primary_provider','reserve_provider','reserve_used','reason','proof_file','checked_at'],
 'status':'required_not_yet_completed',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':'PROVIDER_GATE_PENDING'
}
provider_gate_file=provider_gates/'bem605_provider_gate_required.json'
provider_gate_file.write_text(json.dumps(provider_gate,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

# Draft operator package is not final; it will be sent after Claude response. Record a placeholder only.
placeholder={
 'schema_version':'operator_decision_queue.placeholder.v1',
 'decision_id':'bem605_hourly_report_template_operator_approval_PENDING_CLAUDE',
 'status':'blocked_until_claude_audit_response',
 'reason':'Operator approval package must include agreed GPT+Claude template, not unilateral GPT draft.',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'
}
placeholder_file=operator_queue/'bem605_hourly_report_template_operator_approval_PENDING_CLAUDE.json'
placeholder_file.write_text(json.dumps(placeholder,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

protocol=protocols/'HOURLY_REPORT_TEMPLATE_APPROVAL_FLOW.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-605 | Hourly Report Template Approval Flow'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Flow'+sep+'Curator -> Role Orchestrator -> Analyst GPT -> Claude Auditor -> Operator decision package -> Provider gate -> Executor -> Internal audit -> Selftest -> Monitoring report.'+sep+sep+'## Rule'+sep+'Do not implement hourly report template before Claude audit and operator approval package, unless operator explicitly bypasses approval.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_request.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-605 | Hourly Report Template Claude Request | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Task package, analyst plan, Claude audit request, mailbox message, and provider gate requirement created.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(curator_file)+sep+'- '+str(role_file)+sep+'- '+str(task_file)+sep+'- '+str(plan_file)+sep+'- '+str(auditor_req_file)+sep+'- '+str(claude_mail)+sep+'- '+str(provider_gate_file)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'CLAUDE_AUDIT_RESPONSE_PENDING'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_request','cycle_id':'bem605-hourly-report-template-claude-request','source':'gpt_curator_analyst','status':'waiting_for_claude_audit','files':{'curator':str(curator_file),'role_orchestrator':str(role_file),'internal_task':str(task_file),'analyst_plan':str(plan_file),'auditor_request':str(auditor_req_file),'mailbox_to_claude':str(claude_mail),'provider_gate':str(provider_gate_file),'operator_placeholder':str(placeholder_file)},'blocker':{'code':'CLAUDE_AUDIT_RESPONSE_PENDING','message':'Claude must review template before operator approval package is finalized.'},'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_request']={'status':'waiting_for_claude_audit','mailbox_to_claude':str(claude_mail),'provider_gate':str(provider_gate_file),'blocker':record['blocker']}
state['hourly_report_template_flow']='claude_audit_pending'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=record['blocker']
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_request.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-605 PASS: hourly report template task routed to Claude auditor via mailbox; provider gate required before execution.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(curator_file),str(role_file),str(task_file),str(plan_file),str(plan_md),str(auditor_req_file),str(claude_mail),str(provider_gate_file),str(placeholder_file),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created full task chain for hourly Telegram report template and sent review request to Claude auditor via mailbox with provider gate requirement')
"""
No issue comments.
